Localization.Description: A network API call on behalf of a process run from a suspicious directory

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: A failed attempt to call network API on behalf of process {subject.process.name} run from suspicious directory ({reason}) on host {event_src.host} is detected
User {subject.account.name} called network API on behalf of suspicious file "{subject.process.name}" run from suspicious directory ({reason}) on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} failed to call network API on behalf of suspicious file "{subject.process.name}" run from suspicious directory ({reason}) on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} failed to call network API on behalf of process {subject.process.name} run from suspicious directory ({reason}) on host {event_src.host}
A network API call on behalf of process {subject.process.name} run from suspicious directory ({reason}) on host {event_src.host} is detected
User {subject.account.name} called network API on behalf of process {subject.process.name} run from suspicious directory ({reason}) on host {event_src.host}
